Set these server-side environment variables for `subscribe.php`:

LOOPS_API_KEY=your_loops_api_key
LOOPS_FORM_ENDPOINT_URL=https://app.loops.so/api/newsletter-form/your_form_id
LOOPS_MAILING_LIST_IDS=your_public_early_access_list_id
LOOPS_SOURCE=website
LOOPS_USER_GROUP=Early Access

Notes:
- `LOOPS_FORM_ENDPOINT_URL` comes from Loops -> Forms -> Settings -> Form Endpoint.
- `LOOPS_MAILING_LIST_IDS` is optional, but needed if you want signups added to the public "Early Access" mailing list.
- The form endpoint preserves Loops double opt-in behavior.
